name: istseh-medsai
description: Task runner for quick setup and local development without Docker.

scripts.setup:backend: cd backend && python3 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install -e . && .venv/bin/pip install pytest pytest-asyncio
scripts.uv:setup: cd backend && uv venv && uv sync
scripts.uv:dev: cd backend && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000
scripts.uv:db:upgrade: cd backend && uv run alembic upgrade head

author: Osama
